title: Monitor hybrid virtual machines, containers, and network resources
summary: Learn how to monitor virtual machines, containers, and network resources in a hybrid environment with Azure Monitor.

sections.title: Monitor hybrid virtual machines, containers, and network resources
sections.summary: Learn how to monitor virtual machines, containers, and network resources in a hybrid environment with Azure Monitor.

lessons.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor your Azure VMs by using Azure Monitor to collect and analyze VM host and client metrics and logs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-vm-using-diagnostic-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor

lessons.title: Monitor your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers
lessons.content_md:
Understand the monitoring capabilities of Azure Arc-enabled servers. Learn about the benefits of and how to onboard Azure Arc-enabled servers to Azure Logs and Metrics, VM Insights, and Azure Monitor Alerts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-arc-enabled-servers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your hybrid and multicloud machines through Azure Arc-enabled servers

lessons.title: Design and implement network monitoring
lessons.content_md:
You learn to design and implement network monitoring solutions such as Azure Monitor and Network watcher.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/design-implement-network-monitoring/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Monitor hybrid virtual machines, containers, and network resources
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Monitor hybrid virtual machines, containers, and network resources**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
